summary: Pool reconciled, BGP route present, 5/5 curls to ext-backend via Pool succeeded

assertions.description: Pool CR has at least one member entry on :80
FRR BGP table has 203.0.113.101/32 advertised by TMM
assertions.got: BGP table version is 17, local router ID is 192.168.99.20, vrf id 0 Default local pref 100, local AS 65001 Status codes: s suppressed, d damped, h history, * valid, > best, = multipath, i internal, r …

assertions.description: 5/5 curls via Gateway return ext-backend marker body
